Top of Page Appendix: Potential characteristics of allergic reactions, vasovagal reactions, and vaccine side effects following COVID-19 vaccination 
In patients who experience post-vaccination symptoms, determining the etiology (including allergic reaction, vasovagal reaction, or vaccine side effects) is important to determine whether a person can receive further doses o
